user.title: Connect to your Fraimic frame
user.description: Enter your frame's address. Make sure the frame is awake (tap it) — it is unreachable in deep sleep.

data_description.host: mDNS name (fraimic.local) or IP address of the frame.

resolution.title: Frame resolution
resolution.description: Confirm the display resolution for the frame at {host}. The 13.3" frame is 1600x1200; set the correct pixel size for smaller frames.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the frame. Is it awake and on the same network?

abort.already_configured: This frame is already set up.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the discovered frame.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the frame. The frame is battery-powered; 300 seconds is recommended.

upload_image.name: Upload image
upload_image.description: Convert an ordinary image to the Fraimic .bin format and display it on the frame.

config_entry_id.name: Frame
config_entry_id.description: Which Fraimic frame to upload to. Only required with multiple frames.

path.name: File path
path.description: Local path to an image file (must be in an allowlisted directory).

url.name: Image URL
url.description: HTTP(S) URL of an image to download and display.

image_entity_id.name: Camera / image entity
image_entity_id.description: A camera or image entity whose current frame should be displayed.

fit.name: Fit mode
fit.description: How to fit the source image onto the 1200x1600 portrait display.

dither.name: Dither
dither.description: Apply Floyd-Steinberg dithering to the 6-colour Spectra palette.
